releaseContents: Seguimiento persistente de conversaciones para cuentas registradas.
Avisos de actividad por correo con consentimiento explícito y límite de un envío por tema cada 30 minutos.
Analítica seudónima del embudo con retención de 90 días y consulta agregada para moderadores.
Polling adaptativo de 5, 15 y 30 segundos según actividad, preferencia y visibilidad.
Carga diferida del recurso externo Coloris y caché para recursos estáticos reutilizables.
Corrección de IDs ARIA duplicados en listas de usuarios conectados.
excludedLocalChanges: Informes internos de .agents/reports, documentados después del despliegue.

backup.reason: La versión añade tablas e índices SQLite y una columna de preferencias.

preDeployChecks.localQa: passed: 176 deterministic tests and 12 smoke tests
preDeployChecks.secretScan: no production credentials added; only deterministic test placeholders found
preDeployChecks.formatCheck: not clean: existing repository-wide Prettier debt affects 114 files; no bulk formatting was applied
preDeployChecks.databaseMigration: additive and idempotent through CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS and ensureColumn
preDeployChecks.branchSync: main matched origin/main before the release commit

postDeployVerification.bootstrap: 200 guest payload with 15 topics, Secure HttpOnly cookie and no session ID in the body
postDeployVerification.authorization: anonymous diagnostics and product analytics requests returned 403
postDeployVerification.securityHeaders: HSTS and CSP present where applicable
postDeployVerification.seoEndpoints: robots.txt, sitemap.xml and legal pages returned 200
postDeployVerification.deployedCode: adaptive polling, product events, email preference and lazy Coloris markers are live

browser.desktop: topic selection and conversation rendering passed
browser.mobile: topic selection, conversation view and back navigation passed at 390x844

metrics.assessment: The brief startup peak settled quickly and no error or availability stop condition occurred.

rollback.databaseCompatibility: The migration is additive; the previous code ignores the new tables and column.
rollback.procedure: Redeploy dep-d9cgvcok1i2s739c1f2g for a code rollback. Restore the logical SQLite backup only if persistent data or schema integrity is affected.

unresolvedRisks: The product still foregrounds community and rankings despite the stated goal of prioritizing conversation.
Ranking by volume continues to reward low-quality activity.
There is no dedicated noindex rule for offensive content that has enough comments to avoid the thin-content rule.
The initial browser load still requests the large mascot image and a broad ES-module graph.
Polling remains linear per connected client, although its frequency is now substantially lower.
Repository-wide Prettier debt remains outside this release.
